name: Turkey in a Hurry
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the turkey tenderloins in half lengthwise, then into serving-size pieces.
2. Place the pieces on a rack over a broiler pan.
3. In a small saucepan, melt the butter and heat the remaining ingredients until combined.
4. Broil the turkey until lightly browned on one side.
5. Brush the herb butter onto the turkey; turn and brown the other side.
6. Brush with additional butter.
7. Continue cooking for 6-8 minutes or until no longer pink, brushing often with butter.
